name: Plum-Teri Turkey
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first five ingredients in a bowl.
2. Brush both sides of the turkey breast with some of the mixture.
3. Place the turkey, skin side up, in a shallow foil-lined baking pan and cover with foil.
4. Bake at 450 degrees F for 20 minutes.
5. Reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees F.
6. Discard the foil; turn the turkey over and brush with glaze mixture.
7. Bake for another 40 minutes, brushing with glaze mixture.
8. Continue baking for an additional 40 minutes or until juices run clear when pierced with a fork, brushing with remaining glaze mixture after 20 minutes.
9. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
Source: SPICE UP YOUR MEALS! with Kikkoman Teriyaki Sauces
